creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #10)
> Done. +1 to unmaintained list *without* bugs. Sorry, I couldn't find
> time to help with fixes.
>
> astro/gpstk

Fixed r447064 by tcberner on 2017-08-01.  PR: 219275

Which leaves:

> benchmarks/polygraph
> cad/alliance
> databases/fastdb
> devel/pwlib
> devel/rhtvision
> emulators/pearpc
> lang/gprolog (i386-only)
> mail/annoyance-filter
> sysutils/pesign
